agent/task5_vuln_pcf/252425eb61a39de5.explanation: All three reasonings identify the same two critical issues: the overly permissive CORS configuration (specifically the combination of wildcard origins and allowed credentials) and the logic error of calling router.Use() inside a request handler leading to a memory leak.
